content:
- Final gate sweep is green: make docs-lint, make docs-build, make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint all passed after the container deployment implementation and the one no-quorum test assertion correction.
- I marked the task file done with passes=true, ticked the acceptance criteria, and ran .ralph/task_switch.sh so Ralph moved the task into the done set.
- Next is the final repo commit with the task-finished message, then git push, then stop.
